title: viola × brandisii
intro: Viola × brandisii is a rare, hybrid species of the genus Viola, derived from the cross between Viola lactea and Viola sororia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Viola × brandisii include its potential to reduce stress and improve mood due to its high concentration of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. In herbal preparations, Viola × brandisii is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to promote relaxation and overall well-being.
